$comment: System workspace layout seed definitions for sprk_workspacelayout (isSystem=true). Consumed by Deploy-SystemWorkspaceLayouts.ps1. Section factory IDs MUST match src/solutions/LegalWorkspace/src/sectionRegistry.ts. Layout template IDs MUST match src/client/shared/Spaarke.UI.Components/src/components/WorkspaceShell/layoutTemplates.ts.

layouts.name: Daily Briefing
layouts.description: Wave 2b will auto-install this as the default landing workspace. Replaces hard-coded WorkspaceHomeTab.

layouts.name: Smart To Do List
layouts.description: LegalWorkspace todo section (Smart To Do List).

layouts.name: My Work
layouts.description: LegalWorkspace quick-summary section. Wave 3 task 109 extends with sprk_communication + sprk_invoices cards (no layout JSON change).

layouts.name: Documents
layouts.description: LegalWorkspace documents section (Active Documents). Wave 3 task 110 verifies + add / expand affordances embed-safe in SpaarkeAi.

layouts.name: Calendar
layouts.description: Round-9 task 115. CalendarWorkspaceWidget from @spaarke/events-components — 3-month strip + date-range filter + EventsPage toolbar + view selector + grid of all events+tasks the user has access to. Event detail opens via Xrm.Navigation.navigateTo modal (NOT Xrm.App.sidePanes).

layouts.name: Communications
layouts.description: ai-spaarke-ai-workspace-UI-r2 post-merge parity (2026-07-01). LegalWorkspace communications section (Active Communications — sprk_communication, all types: Email/Teams/SMS/Notification). Row-click opens Layout 1 (85%×85%) via DataGrid framework's defaultRecordOpen per FR-03/FR-20. Note: sortOrder 6 chosen so Compose (added by spaarkeai-compose-r1 at sortOrder 5) is not disturbed.

layouts.name: Projects
layouts.description: ai-spaarke-ai-workspace-UI-r2 post-merge parity (2026-07-01). LegalWorkspace projects section (Active Projects — sprk_project). Row-click opens Layout 1 (85%×85%).

layouts.name: Invoices
layouts.description: ai-spaarke-ai-workspace-UI-r2 post-merge parity (2026-07-01). LegalWorkspace invoices section (Invoice Matter Budget Performance — sprk_invoice). Row-click opens Layout 1 (85%×85%).

layouts.name: Work Assignments
layouts.description: ai-spaarke-ai-workspace-UI-r2 post-merge parity (2026-07-01). LegalWorkspace work-assignments section (Active Work Assignments — sprk_workassignment). Row-click opens Layout 1 (85%×85%).
